title: Pact Community Audit Finding
description: JSON schema for third-party audit findings in Pact Community projects

id.description: Unique finding identifier following pattern AUD-001, AUD-002, etc.

title.description: Concise finding title describing the vulnerability or issue

severity.description: Finding severity based on impact and likelihood matrix

category.description: Functional category or STRIDE classification for the finding

description.description: Clear explanation of what is wrong and why it's a security issue

impact.description: Potential damage if vulnerability is exploited

impact_analysis.description: Detailed explanation of potential consequences if exploited

exploit_steps.description: Step-by-step attack scenario to exploit the vulnerability

line_number.description: Specific line number where issue occurs

line_range.description: Range of lines affected by the issue

function_name.description: Name of function or capability containing the issue

affected_files.description: List of files and locations affected by this finding

code_snippet.description: Relevant code excerpt demonstrating the vulnerability

repl_proof.description: REPL commands that demonstrate the exploit

devnet_proof.description: Devnet transaction or test proving exploitability

static_analysis.description: Static analysis output showing the issue

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the finding (at least one type required)

auditor.description: Auditor or firm name who identified this finding

remediation_date.description: Date when finding was remediated (if status is Fixed-community/Verified)

verification_date.description: Date when fix was verified (if status is Verified)

cve_id.description: CVE identifier if publicly disclosed vulnerability

references.description: External references related to this finding

tags.description: Categorical tags for filtering and analysis

recheck_needed.description: Whether this finding requires re-verification after remediation

blocks_deployment.description: Whether this finding blocks production deployment

stakeholder_discussion.description: Risk acceptance discussion if finding will not be fixed

audit_trail.description: Audit trail of actions taken on this finding

examples.title: Unguarded Treasury Access in distribution-module.pact
examples.description: The claim-dividend function lacks proper capability guards, allowing any user to drain the treasury by specifying arbitrary amounts.
examples.impact_analysis: Complete treasury drain is possible with a single transaction. Estimated $500K+ at risk based on current treasury holdings.
exploit_steps: Specify amount larger than legitimate dividend claim
Transaction succeeds due to missing guard
Treasury funds transferred to attacker account

evidence.devnet_proof: Transaction txid:abc123... successfully drained 500K from treasury

remediation.recommendation: Add proper capability guard requiring CLAIM capability with amount validation
remediation.code_example: (with-capability (CLAIM account amount) (enforce (<= amount owed) "Claim exceeds owed amount") ...)
